changelog.change: [Verified] Regional section updated: EEA now available for basic agent tasks (rolled out late July 2025); Connector-based actions still restricted in EEA/CH/UK
[Verified] Free tier access added (5 lightweight queries/month via o4-mini); Plus/Pro limits updated to include lightweight queries; Team/Enterprise rows added

sources.title: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

changelog.change: Available to all users including logged-out
[Verified] VS Code extension (out of beta) added to platforms; Xcode via Agent SDK noted; URL updated to code.claude.com; talking point updated
[Verified] Expanded to all paid plans (Pro, Team, Enterprise); Windows x64 support added
[Verified] Adaptive thinking introduced with Opus 4.6; effort levels (low/medium/high/max) added; manual mode deprecated on Opus 4.6; URL updated to platform.claude.com
[Verified] Free tier access added as part of Anthropic's February 2026 free tier expansion; gating changed from paid to free
Rebranding to Copilot Studio Lite announced
[Verified] Gating changed from paid to free for Edge users; macOS Edge confirmed; US availability confirmed
Paywall removed — now free for all Edge users with Microsoft account
[Verified] Gating changed from paid to free; free tier now gets ~5 reports/month via Gemini Flash
Gemini CLI Extensions added with MCP support
[Verified] Google One AI Premium renamed to Google AI Pro ($19.99/mo); Google AI Plus ($7.99/mo) and AI Ultra ($249.99/mo) added; AI Plus also includes Gemini Advanced
[Verified] Gating changed from paid to free; Gems available to all users since March 2025; URL updated (old blog URL broken)
[Verified] Gating changed from free to paid; Nano Banana 2 became default for all users (Feb 26, 2026); free users no longer get Nano Banana Pro
Nano Banana Pro launched (Gemini 3 Pro Image)
Initial Nano Banana launched (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image)
Expanded to Pixel 9 and Galaxy S25
Veo 3.1 4K resolution and vertical video support
Veo 3 released with native audio generation
[Verified] Free tier access confirmed (~10 generations per 2-hour window); paid tier limits updated
[Verified] Free tier access confirmed (very limited, ~3/day at 480p); paid tier daily limits updated
Major update announced by Elon Musk
[Verified] Free access confirmed for iOS users; Android still requires subscription
Mistral Small 3.2 with improved function calling
